subject: Physics
chapter: Semiconductor Electronics: Materials, Devices and Simple Circuits

formulas.name: 1. V-I Characteristics of a Diode
formulas.variables: V: Voltage, V₀: Cut-in voltage, α: Constant, I: Current

formulas.name: 2. Cut-in Voltage
formulas.variables: V₀: Cut-in voltage, k: Boltzmann's constant, T: Temperature, q: Charge of an electron

formulas.name: 3. Junction Field-Effect Transistor (JFET)
formulas.variables: I: Current, I_D: Drain current, V_P: Pinch-off voltage, V: Voltage

formulas.name: 4. Drain Current in JFET
formulas.variables: I_D: Drain current, I_0: Drain current at V_GS = 0, V_P: Pinch-off voltage, V: Voltage

formulas.name: 5. Common Base Current Gain
formulas.variables: α: Current gain, I_C: Collector current, I_E: Emitter current

formulas.name: 6. Common Emitter Current Gain
formulas.variables: β: Current gain, I_C: Collector current, I_B: Base current

formulas.name: 7. Transconductance
formulas.variables: g_m: Transconductance, I_D: Drain current, V_GS: Gate-source voltage

formulas.name: 8. Input Resistance
formulas.variables: R_i: Input resistance, V_GS: Gate-source voltage, I_G: Gate current
